testcase.name: test_1_create_order_with_scheme_quantity
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_add_order_enhancements.py:54: in test_1_create_order_with_scheme_quantity assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create order failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create order failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
